children.heading: Prescription of rules and regulations
children.label: a Prescription of rules and regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such rules and regulations as he deems reasonably necessary to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Conformity with rulemaking provisions
children.label: b Conformity with rulemaking provisions
children.text: Rules and regulations issued to implement this chapter shall be issued in conformity with , notwithstanding section 553(a)(2) of that title.section 553 of title 5

children.heading: Contracts with non-Federal Government inspectors, auditors, etc.; coordination of auditing and enforcement functions
children.label: c Contracts with non-Federal Government inspectors, auditors, etc.; coordination of auditing and enforcement functions
children.text: In addition to entering into cooperative agreements or delegation of authority authorized under this chapter, the Secretary may contract with such non-Federal Government inspectors, auditors, and other persons as he deems necessary to aid in carrying out his functions under this chapter and its implementation. With respect to his auditing and enforcement functions under this chapter, the Secretary shall coordinate such functions so as to avoid to the maximum extent practicable, subjecting lessees, operators, or other persons to audits or investigations of the same subject matter by more than one auditing or investigating entity at the same time.
